description: v0.1.1 — Cursor-only platform reduction. Trellis templates, CLI init/update/uninstall, retrieval router, and docs converge on Cursor as the sole managed platform.
changelog:
**Cursor-only product trim.**

- refactor(cli): platform registry, init, uninstall/update, and template dirs reduced to Cursor-only (S1–S11).
- refactor(retrieval): drop `--platform` / non-Cursor dead branches from codebase retrieval planner (R12).
- refactor(core): remove mem module export (R13).
- docs/spec: workflow, AGENTS, README, and guides aligned to cursor-only surface.

Run `trellis update` in each project to sync templates and scripts.
notes: Backfilled manifest for npm 0.1.1 (published without local manifest). No automated migrations; template sync via `trellis update`.
